summary: ABL Pulse - Admin dashboard project with basic welcome page and direct access (no authentication)
architectural_notes: Admin page uses direct access without authentication
Internet Identity verification logic removed for simplicity

existing_features.title: Remove all Internet Identity authentication logic from the AdminLoginPage component, including the login button, authentication flow, and email verification
Transform the AdminDashboardPage into a simple welcome page displaying 'Welcome Admin' as the main heading with minimal dashboard layout
Update the Admin button in the ContactFooter component to navigate directly to the admin dashboard page without any authentication checks or intermediate login screen
Remove or bypass the admin authentication hook (useQueries checkAdminUser) that validates admin access, ensuring the admin page loads without backend permission checks

new_feature_requests.summary: Create basic Admin dashboard with welcome page
Implement direct access to Admin page without authentication
Link Admin button in footer to Admin page
